source_name: ICRC Sudan Operations and Humanitarian Response
citation_text: ICRC reports on humanitarian assistance, health facility support, displacement response, and field operations in Sudan; provides verified casualty and health system impact data.
WHO provides health system assessments, disease surveillance, and health facility operational status in Sudan.

source_name: UNHCR Sudan Refugee and Displacement Response
citation_text: UNHCR provides verified displacement figures, refugee movement data, and camp operational information.
UN OCHA Sudan provides comprehensive situation reports and humanitarian response coordination.
ACLED provides structured conflict event data including armed clashes, violence patterns and locations.
